visual_description.body_proportions: Chibi style with a large head, small rounded body, and short limbs

face.eyes: Large, glossy black eyes with strong highlights for expressiveness
face.expression: Soft, cheerful smile with subtle blush on cheeks
face.markings: Classic red panda white facial mask with symmetrical patterns and small eyebrow spots

fur.accents: Darker orange gradients on tail and outer edges
fur.texture_style: Soft gradient shading with clean vector edges

visual_description.ears: Rounded triangular ears with white inner fur details
visual_description.tail: Thick, fluffy tail with subtle banding and gradient shading

outfit.belt: Black belt tied at the waist
outfit.fit: Simplified and stylized to match chibi proportions
outfit.details: Minimal folds and clean lines to maintain readability at small sizes

design_style.line_work: Clean, bold outlines with consistent stroke weight
design_style.coloring: Flat colors combined with soft gradients for depth
design_style.shading: Minimal, with gentle highlights and subtle shadowing
design_style.complexity: Low to medium detail for scalability and clarity
design_style.readability: Highly readable at small sizes, suitable for UI and icons

brand_alignment.fit: Bridges playfulness with discipline, aligning with martial arts themes
